-mtune=generic -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/radio_ssb.dir/radio_ssb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radio_ssb.dir/lower_phy_example_factory.cpp.o
